description_long: This is a modern assault rifle with a distinctive black and white color scheme accented by red highlights. The rifle features a fixed stock and a curved detachable box magazine, typical of AK-pattern rifles. The receiver and barrel assembly are robust, with visible iron sights mounted at the front and rear. The handguard and grip are ergonomically shaped, likely made from polymer or composite materials for durability and comfort. The muzzle end appears to have a standard flash hider, and the overall design suggests a weapon built for reliability and ease of use in urban environments. The surface finish is mostly matte with some glossy elements, giving it a sleek yet practical appearance.
description: A black, white, and red modern assault rifle with a fixed stock, curved magazine, and iron sights. The design is robust and ergonomic, suitable for urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, front sight, and the narrow profile of the barrel and handguard.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the rifle, including the fixed stock, curved magazine, and detailed receiver.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the buttstock and the alignment of the barrel, with the magazine partially visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite side of the receiver, stock, and magazine, with similar detailing as the left.
